ogTitle: Aldoga vs Alexandra Headland: Climate Safety

heading: Aldoga vs Alexandra Headland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Aldoga, Queensland and Alexandra Headland, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Alexandra Headland has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Aldoga (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Aldoga or Alexandra Headland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Aldoga has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Alexandra Headland scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Aldoga scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Alexandra Headland scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Aldoga or Alexandra Headland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Alexandra Headland has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
